creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
MediaWiki 1.4 is no longer supported by the MediaWiki Foundation.
This meens, there will be no more security fixes for this branch.

All users should upgrade their MediaWiki installations to one of the newer versions (www/mediawiki15, www/mediawiki16 or www/mediawiki).

The port will expire on 1st of October, 2006.
